execution_run.what happened: ingested new #1021 child issues #1031 and #1032, created follow-up #1033 for the remaining freehand-artifact helper gap, encoded the mutation provenance role as a transitional recovery aid, demoted archive_missing_execution_summary after closeout evidence options landed, and added contract tests for the review result.
execution_run.scope touched: operational affordance role contract, structured file inventory classification, contract schemas, and contract tooling tests.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py::test_operational_affordance_roles_classify_first_contact_and_diagnostics tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; make lint-workspace

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; #1031 now has an explicit provenance policy, #1032 has an evidence-backed remaining-detector answer, and #1033 routes the unresolved helper gap.
